name: idecn
description: IDE-like UI components for React with material-icon-theme icons

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun x tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --dts --deps.neverBundle react --deps.neverBundle react-dom --deps.neverBundle @base-ui/react && bun scripts/gen-demo-tree.ts && cd web && bun run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules bun.lock dist .cache .next .turbo web/node_modules web/.next
scripts.gen: bun scripts/gen-icons.ts && bun scripts/gen-demo-tree.ts && bun scripts/build-registry.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun x tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --dts --deps.neverBundle react --deps.neverBundle react-dom --deps.neverBundle @base-ui/react
